programs.title: Storage Wars
programs.desc: Lisa returns to Moreno Valley, where it all started and gets nostalgic with her locker. Meanwhile, Kenny welcomes a new granddaughter to the clan.

actor: Darrell Sheets,Brandi Passante,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Barry Weiss,Ivy Calvin,Ivy Calvin Jr.,Isaiah Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Kenny Crossley,Lisa DeLarios,Dusty Riach,Thom Beers

programs.title: Pawn Stars
programs.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

programs.title: Storage Wars
programs.desc: Barry takes on a new disciple and Lisa gets clinical with her find, forcing her to take a closer look. Meanwhile, the new guy pays heavily for a unit.

actor: Darrell Sheets,Jarrod Schulz,Brandi Passante,Dave Hester,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Brandon Sheets,Ivy Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Casey Nezhoda,Thom Beers,Emily Wears,Mary Padian,Kenny Crossley,Justin Bryant,Edwina Registre,Shana Dahan

programs.title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
programs.desc: Explore a bizarre tractor race in Punjab, an extraordinarily large thali no one has ever managed to finish and a man from Kerala who is fond of letting thousands of bees sit on his face.

programs.title: Firepower: Defending India
programs.desc: Take a look at how Indian troops brave icy weathers of the Siachen Glacier and how the Medical Corps evacuates an injured soldier.

programs.title: Counting Cars
programs.desc: Danny inspects a collection featuring a 1993 Ford Roadster and 1953 Henry J. Later, Kevin, Ryan and Mike experience the strain of proving their unauthorized purchase's worth.
